blended.narrative: Schweitzer is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,020 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
